# MCP Debug

Use this skill when MCP tools or resources are missing, misrouted, or running
on the wrong side of a remote session.

## Checklist

1. Confirm whether the session is local or Remote-SSH / Dev Pod.
2. Check whether MCP config comes from workspace or user settings.
3. Confirm the server command exists on the expected machine.
4. Check whether the target resources appear in the MCP server catalog.
5. Verify the failure is in transport, auth, command path, or resource shape.
